appDesc.message: Analyze trading charts directly in your browser using local AI.

idleText.message: Click below to analyze the chart on the current page.

idleTextTextModel.message: Text model selected. Type or speak a question below.

ollamaNotRunning.message: Ollama is not running. Start it to use local models.

micPermissionDesc.message: TradeLens AI needs microphone access to transcribe your voice notes. Click the button below and click Allow when prompted by Chrome.

micPermissionSuccess.message: Permission granted! You can now close this tab and use the microphone button in the TradeLens AI side panel.

micPermissionDenied.message: Permission denied. Please enable microphone access for TradeLens AI in Chrome settings (chrome://settings/content/microphone).

gdprConsent.message: I consent to secure cloud data transmission for analysis.

verifyDecisions.message: AI can make mistakes. Verify important decisions.

screenCtxAvailable.message: Screen context available from last vision analysis

howItWorksDesc.message: TradeLens AI combines computer vision with large language models to provide professional trading insights. It captures your screen, identifies chart patterns, indicators, and price action, then generates a detailed analysis based on your selected mode.

setupStep1Desc.message: Open chrome://extensions/, enable Developer mode, and load the extension folder.

setupStep2Desc.message: Download Ollama from ollama.com and run a model (e.g., qwen2.5vl).

setupStep3Desc.message: Restart Ollama with OLLAMA_ORIGINS="chrome-extension://*" to allow the extension to connect.
